# MD. Tanvir Shakil

> Electronics and embedded-systems engineer and researcher based in Dhaka, Bangladesh. Solution Architect (IoT, AIoT, IIoT) at MBM Group. Focus: edge AI / TinyML on microcontrollers, sensor fusion, low-power PCB and firmware design, CubeSat / space systems, precision agriculture, and EV power electronics. Open to graduate research (M.Sc. / Ph.D.).

## Current role
- Solution Architect (IoT, AIoT, IIoT) — MBM Group, Dhaka, Bangladesh.

## Research experience
- Junior Research Fellow, SPARRSO (Bangladesh Space Research Organization), FY2023–FY2025 — 1U CubeSat design and manufacture, engineering-model CubeSat, prototype solid propulsion, full PCB and firmware.
- Research Associate / IoT Engineer, BAU-RIC (Bangladesh Agricultural University), Nov 2024–Nov 2025 — AI-based estrus-detection harness tag for cattle; PCB, firmware, sensor fusion, AIoT.

## Selected industry experience
- Palki Motors Ltd. — Embedded Systems Lead & HoD (EV internal systems, charging, power electronics).
- THT Space Electrical Company Ltd. — AIoT Engineer.
- Adorsho PraniSheba — IoT Engineer (livestock AIoT wearable; TinyML, BLE, MQTT).
- FronTech Ltd. — Sr. Executive R&D (IIoT predictive maintenance, active PFC, FFT).
- Neways International — IoT Engineer (smart home automation and security; 1:N fingerprint matching).

## Publications
- IEEE ECCE 2025 — IoT-based energy-efficient smart home automation. DOI: 10.1109/ECCE64574.2025.11013781
- JCSTS 2025 — AI-enhanced smart assistive stick for the visually impaired. DOI: 10.32996/jcsts.2025.7.1.21
- JMHS 2025 — Embedded ventilator for accessible respiratory support. DOI: 10.32996/jmhs.2025.6.1.14
- IJSB 2023 — DTMF-based remote irrigation with interactive voice response. DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.7534982

## Expertise
Embedded C/C++, STM32, ESP32, ARM Cortex-M, AVR, FreeRTOS, PCB design (Altium), low-power design, TinyML, edge AI, TensorFlow/Keras, sensor fusion, FFT/DSP, MQTT, CoAP, LoRa, BLE, GSM, RS485/Modbus, CAN bus, AWS IoT, Firebase, Python, MicroPython, MATLAB.
